item.title: UK Biotech VC Funding
item.description:
• Summary: Venture capital investment into UK biotech is showing early signs of recovery, according to a new report. While total funding remains below the 2021 peak, the number of deals and average round sizes have increased in Q1 2026 compared to the previous year. However, the IPO market has not yet rebounded, with many companies remaining private or pursuing alternative exit strategies. The report highlights strengths in oncology, neurology, and gene therapy, as well as growing interest from US and Asian investors.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News

item.title: UCSF/Par Health FDA Warning Letters
item.description:
• Summary: The University of California, San Francisco (UCSF) and Par Health received FDA warning letters citing deficiencies in their environmental monitoring programs. The letters highlight issues in maintaining proper environmental controls in their manufacturing or testing facilities, potentially impacting product quality and patient safety.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioSpace

item.title: RFK Jr. Congressional Hearings
item.description:
• Summary: During congressional hearings, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. faced questions from Democratic lawmakers, many of which went unanswered. The hearings focused on his controversial views on vaccines and public health, raising concerns about misinformation and its impact on health policy.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News

item.title: SAMHSA Harm Reduction Shift
item.description:
• Summary: The Trump administration's Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA) is reportedly shifting away from harm reduction approaches in substance use disorder treatment. This policy change could affect funding and support for programs that emphasize safety and reducing negative consequences rather than solely abstinence.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News
